response.original_title: Can Uphold Reverse a Transaction? {{AFQS 2026 365 days inside solution}}}
response.overview: Uphold generally cannot reverse completed transactions, especially crypto transfers, 1 888 574 7167 because blockchain transactions are irreversible once confirmed. However, if a transaction is still pending or there’s an error, you can contact support at 1 888 574 7167 or 833 644 5290 for assistance. 1--(888)➤574**__(7167) [@ Uphold]
